_description: Generates background/setting only. Use this FIRST to create your scene.

inputs.text:
Create a children's storybook scene - ENVIRONMENT ONLY.

STYLE:
{{STYLE}}

SETTING:
{{SETTING}}

ATMOSPHERE:
{{ATMOSPHERE}}

LIGHTING:
{{LIGHTING}}

COMPOSITION:
{{COMPOSITION}}

RULES:
- Environment and setting ONLY
- NO characters, NO people, NO animals, NO creatures
- Leave clear open space for character placement later
- Beautiful lighting, depth, and atmosphere
- Consistent with the specified art style
- No text, no watermark, no logo
character, person, people, child, boy, girl, man, woman, animal, creature, figure, rabbit, deer, fox, bird, dog, cat, human, face, body, photorealistic, 3d render, text, watermark, logo
